title: bursera decandra
intro: Bursera decandra, also known as Copal Tree, is a plant species native to Central America and Mexico, characterized by its aromatic resinous sap. The medicinal properties of Bursera decandra lie in its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Bursera decandra include relieving respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as treating wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues. The herbal preparations of Bursera decandra include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
